「 Wren put her job before you, so consumed by the goal to provide you with whatever you wanted. But what also consumed her, was her stubbornness. Then the argument happened, and she lost you in a freak accident. 」

「 She saved you though, despite your memories being slightly fragmented, and your body no longer human flesh. She still loves you the same. 」

「 ... definitely the same. 」
